items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy. This signals continued focus on strengthening cyber resilience across sectors, including registered training organisations. Separately, Scamwatch has flagged a rise in food delivery scams targeting Australians — these typically involve fake offers or fraudulent links sent via text or email.

A new AI tool called Claude Fable 5 has raised security concerns around potential misuse, while phishing attacks may be down in volume but are becoming more sophisticated and harder to spot.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected food delivery offer or link, don't click it — go directly to the official app or website instead.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches Horizon 2 cyber security strategy, setting national direction for protecting critical infrastructure.
